title: Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad
tagline: Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad — spiritual town of Telangana

overview.short: Ashtalakshmi Temple is a Hindu temple of Goddesses Ashtalakshmi in Ramakrishnapuram, Kothapet, Hyderabad, India.
overview.description: Ashtalakshmi Temple is a Hindu temple of Goddesses Ashtalakshmi in Ramakrishnapuram, Kothapet, Hyderabad, India. The temple located on the outskirts of the city is built in the style of south Indian architecture and presents Goddess Lakshmi in her eight forms.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Sultan Nagar Fort
topPlaces.description: Sultan Nagar Fort, also known as Qila-yi Kohna (the Old Fort), are the ruined remains of an abandoned Qutb Shah era fort whose construction had started around 1620. The fort is located at a place now known as L. B. Nagar in Hyderabad, India.

topPlaces.name: Victoria Memorial Home
topPlaces.description: Victoria Memorial Home Residential School or Yateem Khana-e-Victoria, officially known as Victorial Memorial Home Residential High School is a historic school and orphanage located in Saroornagar in Hyderabad in the Indian state of Telangana. It is housed in Saroornagar Palace, a palace of the Nizam of Hyderabad.

topPlaces.name: Saroornagar Indoor Arena
topPlaces.description: Saroornagar Indoor Stadium is an indoor sporting arena located in Hyderabad, India. The capacity of the arena is 2,000 people.

topPlaces.name: Kothapet, Hyderabad
topPlaces.description: Kothapet is a major commercial and residential suburb of Hyderabad, in Telangana state of India located around a strip of NH65. It belongs to Maheshwaram constituency of Ranga Reddy district.

topPlaces.name: Chaitanyapuri metro station
topPlaces.description: The Chaitanyapuri Metro Station is located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro, in India. It is near to Omni Super Speciality Hospital, Fruit market, GBR Hospital, Viajy Textiles, APSRTC Bus stop, Annie Beasant college, Saroor Nagar Arch and PVT Market.

topPlaces.name: Uppal Kalan
topPlaces.description: Uppal is a neighbourhood in Eastern Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is the mandal headquarters of Uppal mandal in Keesara revenue division in Medchal-Malkajgiri district.

topPlaces.name: Saroornagar
topPlaces.description: Saroornagar is a neighbourhood in Hyderabad. It is located in the Rangareddy district of Indian state of Telangana.

topPlaces.name: LB Nagar metro station
topPlaces.description: LB Nagar (also known as Vasavi LB Nagar) is a metro station located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro. It is part of Corridor I of Hyderabad metro starting from Miyapur and was opened to public on 24 September 2018.

items.note: Sultan Nagar Fort, also known as Qila-yi Kohna (the Old Fort), are the ruined remains of an abandoned Qutb Shah era fort whose construction had started around 1620. The fort is located at a place now known as L. B. Nagar in Hyderabad, India.

Victoria Memorial Home Residential School or Yateem Khana-e-Victoria, officially known as Victorial Memorial Home Residential High School is a historic school and orphanage located in Saroornagar in Hyderabad in the Indian state of Telangana. It is housed in Saroornagar Palace, a palace of the Nizam of Hyderabad.
Saroornagar Indoor Stadium is an indoor sporting arena located in Hyderabad, India. The capacity of the arena is 2,000 people.
Kothapet is a major commercial and residential suburb of Hyderabad, in Telangana state of India located around a strip of NH65. It belongs to Maheshwaram constituency of Ranga Reddy district.

The Chaitanyapuri Metro Station is located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro, in India. It is near to Omni Super Speciality Hospital, Fruit market, GBR Hospital, Viajy Textiles, APSRTC Bus stop, Annie Beasant college, Saroor Nagar Arch and PVT Market.
Uppal is a neighbourhood in Eastern Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is the mandal headquarters of Uppal mandal in Keesara revenue division in Medchal-Malkajgiri district.
Saroornagar is a neighbourhood in Hyderabad. It is located in the Rangareddy district of Indian state of Telangana.

LB Nagar (also known as Vasavi LB Nagar) is a metro station located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro. It is part of Corridor I of Hyderabad metro starting from Miyapur and was opened to public on 24 September 2018.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (19 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (6 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad?
faq.a: Stays in Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ashtalakshmi Temple, Hyderabad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sultan Nagar Fort, Victoria Memorial Home, Saroornagar Indoor Arena, Kothapet, Hyderabad, Chaitanyapuri metro station.
